title: The Private Life of Don Juan
writer: Henry Bataille, Frederick Lonsdale, Lajos Biró
actors: Douglas Fairbanks, Merle Oberon, Bruce Winston
plot: What do women want? Don Juan is aging. He's arrived secretly in Seville after a 20-year absence. His wife Dolores, with whom he hasn't lived in five years, still loves him. He refuses to see her; he fears the life of a husband. Sh...
